sections.paragraph: ἀποτάσσω [ἀπό, τάσσω; ἀποτάσσω expresses the opposite of τάσσω ‘arrange in a desired order or position’ and focuses on separation, with such senses as ‘exclude, detach’; mod. Gk. ‘dismiss’ from a position] mid. bid farewell, take leave of, say goodbye to Mk 6:46; Lk 9:61; Ac 18:18, 21; 2 Cor 2:13; in imagery of forsaking possessions Lk 14:33.
